'''Thunder lizards''' were massive creatures native to [[Marca/Legends|Marca]]. Twelve [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and three meters high, they were primarily aquatic herbivores, eating seaweeds in the shallows and coming on land only to mate.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of the Mists]]''
